cases.title: Event completion attendance finalization marks checked-in participant Attended per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event progressed through RegistrationClosed and InProgress with valid check-in window
Participant registration in CheckedIn state with one valid CheckinRecord
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor authorized to complete the event
steps: Invoke eventService.complete(eventId, organizerContext)
Query registration row by registrationId and compare with cohort without check-in
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 row satisfied: participant with valid check-in is Attended; Registered-without-check-in cohort member is Absent; event state is Completed

cases.title: Event completion and CheckedIn-to-Attended transition commit in one DB transaction
preconditions: Real database fixture with Registered participant checked in (CheckedIn) and valid CheckinRecord
Event in InProgress state ready for completion
OrganizerAdmin actor context
steps: Execute eventService.complete against real Postgres
Query event.state, registrations.state, and checkin_records in the same database session immediately after commit
cases.expected: Event is Completed; CheckedIn registration is Attended; prior CheckinRecord and checkinAt timestamp remain unchanged; no partial write (event Completed but registration still CheckedIn) per module breakdown §4 transaction boundary

cases.title: markAttendance transitions CheckedIn registration to Attended when event completes
preconditions: Registration in CheckedIn state before event completion
Valid CheckinRecord exists for the registration
Event in InProgress state with completion trigger available
steps: Record beforeState as CheckedIn from registration repository
Trigger event completion via eventService.complete
Read afterState from registration repository
cases.expected: beforeState CheckedIn, afterState Attended per state machine §2; markAttendance guard satisfied (event complete); CheckinRecord unchanged

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/complete returns HTTP 200 and marks checked-in registration Attended
preconditions: E2E fixture event with registered participant checked in via POST /events/{eventId}/checkins
Event in InProgress state
OrganizerAdmin JWT with scope for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with organizer Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?state=Attended&page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with event state Completed; attended list includes the checked-in registrationId with state Attended

cases.title: Self check-in participant appears Attended in GET /me/registrations after completion
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Participant completed self check-in within window (registration CheckedIn)
Event InProgress ready for completion
OrganizerAdmin JWT for completion step
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant token during InProgress
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with organizer token
GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 for the participant
cases.expected: HTTP 200 on completion; participant registration item shows state Attended regardless of staff vs self check-in method

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle completion step finalizes checked-in participant as Attended
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in (CheckedIn)
Event InProgress with valid prior check-in recorded
Organizer token from prior flow steps
steps: Execute Flow A event completion step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete
GET registration state for the checked-in participant before proceeding to feedback/eligibility steps
cases.expected: Checked-in participant registration is Attended, enabling downstream feedback and eligibility evaluation per workflow D

cases.title: Organizer registrations view shows Attended status badge after event completion
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in with event scope
Event completed with at least one participant who checked in during the window
Organizer registrations or attendance management page available
steps: Navigate to organizer event registrations or attendance list for the completed event
Locate participant who had valid check-in before completion
Observe displayed registration state badge or column
cases.expected: UI shows Attended status for the checked-in participant; state reflects post-completion finalization without manual refresh beyond normal client update

cases.title: Participant my registrations shows Attended after event completion
preconditions: Participant logged in who self or staff checked in before event ended
Event has been completed by organizer
Participant my registrations page available
steps: Navigate to participant my registrations list
Find the completed event registration row
Observe state badge or status column for the event
cases.expected: Registration row displays Attended terminal state for the event where participant had valid check-in

cases.title: Participant denied POST /events/{eventId}/complete
preconditions: Event InProgress with participant in CheckedIn state
Authenticated participant JWT only (no organizer capability)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized per roles matrix; registration remains CheckedIn; event remains InProgress; no attendance finalization side effects

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied event completion on event outside assigned scope
preconditions: Event InProgress with checked-in participant but event not assigned to staff actor
Authenticated OrganizerStaff JWT without scope for eventId
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with staff JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope policy; registration remains CheckedIn; event state unchanged; Attended finalization does not occur

cases.title: Registered participant without valid check-in is marked Absent not Attended on completion
preconditions: Event with at least two Registered participants
Only one participant has valid CheckinRecord (CheckedIn); other remains Registered
Event ready for completion
steps: Complete event via eventService.complete
Query both registration states
cases.expected: Checked-in participant is Attended; participant without valid check-in is Absent per BR-12; AC-07 scope limited to valid check-in holders

cases.title: Mixed cohort attendance finalization assigns Attended and Absent correctly
preconditions: Single event with multiple Registered participants
Subset checked in within window; remainder never checked in
No waitlisted or cancelled registrations in the cohort under test
steps: Record in-window check-ins for subset only
Complete event via eventService.complete against real Postgres
List all registrations for the event and group by terminal state
cases.expected: Every CheckedIn registration becomes Attended; every Registered-without-check-in becomes Absent; no registration remains CheckedIn or Registered after completion

cases.title: CheckedIn registration cannot transition to Attended before event completion
preconditions: Event InProgress with participant in CheckedIn state
No direct markAttendance API exposed outside completion workflow
steps: Attempt to set or transition registration to Attended while event remains InProgress
Inspect registration state
cases.expected: Transition rejected or unavailable with 409 or equivalent; registration remains CheckedIn until event completion triggers markAttendance

cases.title: Waitlisted registration is not marked Attended on event completion
preconditions: Event at capacity with waitlist enabled
Participant registration in Waitlisted state (never promoted to Registered)
Event progressed to completion
steps: Complete event via eventService.complete
Query waitlisted participant registration state
cases.expected: Waitlisted registration does not transition to Attended; terminal state follows waitlist/expiry policy (e.g. Expired), preserving AC-07 scope to valid check-in holders only

cases.title: Cancelled registration is not marked Attended on event completion
preconditions: Participant had Registered then CancelledByUser before check-in
Another participant checked in for contrast
Event completes normally
steps: Complete event via eventService.complete
Query cancelled registration state and checked-in participant state
cases.expected: Cancelled registration remains in cancelled terminal state; only CheckedIn registrations become Attended

cases.title: Repeated POST complete is idempotent for already Attended registrations
preconditions: Event already Completed with checked-in participant in Attended state
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete again
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations and locate the attended participant
cases.expected: Registration remains Attended; no duplicate attendance side effects; invalid re-completion returns HTTP 409 or equivalent without corrupting Attended state

cases.title: POST complete rejected when event not in InProgress state
preconditions: Event in RegistrationOpen or Completed state (not InProgress)
Checked-in participant fixture may exist from prior run
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with OrganizerAdmin JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 409 with stable invalid-transition error code; event and registration states unchanged; no premature Attended finalization

cases.title: Attendance finalization for all registrations commits atomically with event completion
preconditions: Multiple CheckedIn and Registered participants on same event
Database transaction boundary for event completion and attendance reconciliation per module breakdown
steps: Complete event in single operation against real Postgres
Query event state and all affected registration states in same database session
cases.expected: Event is Completed and all registrations have consistent terminal attendance states (Attended or Absent); no partial finalization where event is Completed but some CheckedIn rows remain unchecked

cases.title: GET /events/{eventId}/attendance reflects Attended participants after completion
preconditions: Event completed after in-window check-ins
OrganizerStaff JWT with attendance read scope for the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 after completion
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?state=Attended&page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: HTTP 200 on both endpoints; attendance list includes checked-in participants with checkinAt preserved; corresponding registrations show state Attended in paginated registrations response

cases.title: Attended status satisfies downstream certificate eligibility attendance prerequisite
preconditions: Event completed with checked-in participant marked Attended via Flow A
Feedback not yet submitted; eligibility evaluation available post-completion
steps: Confirm Attended state via GET /api/v1/me/registrations
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me for the attended participant
cases.expected: Eligibility evaluation does not fail attendance rule solely due to missing Attended status; Attended registration satisfies BR-17 minimum attendance condition (other rules may still yield NotEligible)

cases.title: GET /events/{eventId}/status-history records CheckedIn to Attended transition
preconditions: Participant checked in and event completed
OrganizerAdmin JWT with status-history read scope
steps: Complete event after check-in
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/status-history?registrationId={registrationId}&page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated history including CheckedIn to Attended transition with timestamp and trigger context (event completion), supporting operational traceability
